title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IRCTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IRCTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!
